# API Tutorial Catalog

## Overview
Catalog of 9 research tutorial categories from `research/*/` covering API integrations and programming concepts.

### Phase 1: Preparation
- Review prerequisites and setup requirements
- Gather necessary tools and dependencies

### Phase 2: Execution
- Follow the step-by-step workflow
- Handle errors and edge cases as they arise

### Phase 3: Verification
- Confirm the output meets requirements
- Run verification checks before completing

## Tutorial Categories

### Payment APIs
| Topic | Files | Key Concepts |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| PayPal | 2 | PayPal REST API, payment flows, webhooks |
| Paystack | 2 | African payments, transaction APIs, recurring billing |
| Flutterwave | 1 | Transfers API, African payment gateway |

### Cryptocurrency
| Topic | Files | Key Concepts |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| Binance API | 2 | Python client, spot trading, REST/WebSocket |
| Busha API | 2 | African crypto exchange, wallet API |
| Crypto Wallets | 3 | Wallet generation, CryptoAPIs, blockchain |

### Programming
| Topic | Files | Key Concepts |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| Python asyncio | 7 | Async/await, event loop, coroutines, concurrency patterns |
| Face Mask Video | 3 | Video processing, face detection, UV4L, VSDC |

### Agent Frameworks
| Topic | Files | Key Concepts |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| Hermes Agents | 3 | Agent setup, deep dive, custom agents, NetworkChuck guide |

## See Also
- Full extracted content: `.hermes/plans/extracted-content/research-extracted.md` (28K)

## Pitfalls

- **Stale cache:** Always re-read files from disk after editing; don't rely on cached context
- **Context limits:** Process in batches; write results after each batch

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Skill has clear purpose and structured workflow
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete and valid
- [ ] All reference files exist and are substantive
- [ ] No placeholder text
